entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, the lead organization for integrated watershed management projects

entities.name: INTEGRATED WATERSHED MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A project approach aimed at scaling innovation-development in India and South Asia

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where integrated watershed management projects were implemented

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: A region where integrated watershed management projects were implemented

entities.name: ISLANDING APPROACH
entities.description: A driver for scaling that involves establishing models for showcasing interventions

entities.name: MULTI-LAYERED PARTNERSHIP
entities.description: A driver for scaling involving various actors and consortiums

entities.name: KNOWLEDGE SHARING
entities.description: A driver for scaling involving innovative means of information exchange

entities.name: CONSORTIUM MODE OF PARTNERSHIP
entities.description: A partnership structure used to establish islands and provide resources

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER CONSERVATION
entities.description: Interventions showcased within the islanding approach

entities.name: FARMING SYSTEM
entities.description: A system comprising crops and livestock integrated with watershed interventions

entities.name: CROPS
entities.description: Agricultural plants that are part of the farming system

entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Domesticated animals that are part of the farming system

entities.name: SOCIO-ECONOMIC DIMENSION
entities.description: Aspects of the farming system including capacity building

entities.name: CAPACITY BUILDING
entities.description: The process of developing skills and abilities, part of the socio-economic dimension

entities.name: SATELLITE WATERSHEDS
entities.description: Areas where the island models are replicated

entities.name: SOCIAL CAPITAL
entities.description: A resource provided through the consortium approach

entities.name: VIRTUAL ACADEMY FOR THE SEMI-ARID TROPICS (VASAT)
entities.description: An innovation in capacity building and information management

entities.name: INFORMATION MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The organization and control of information, a focus of VASAT

entities.name: RURAL FARM HOUSEHOLDS
entities.description: The target beneficiaries linked to researchers via VASAT

entities.name: RESEARCHERS
entities.description: Experts linked to rural farm households via VASAT

entities.name: INFORMATION COMMUNICATION TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Channels used to link farmers to intermediaries and markets

entities.name: MARKETS
entities.description: Commercial hubs linked to farmers through ICT and learning methods

entities.name: OPEN/DISTANCE LEARNING METHODS
entities.description: Methods used as an interface for information and market access

entities.name: SOUTH-SOUTH PARTNERSHIP
entities.description: A partnership between developing countries supported by VASAT

entities.name: CREDIBLE INTERMEDIARIES
entities.description: Entities linking farmers to markets

entities.name: INNOVATION-DEVELOPMENT TO SCALING
entities.description: The complex process of moving from innovation to wide adoption
